title: Flatland Fluid Dynamics and EML-3

analysis.object: T545: Flatland Fluid Dynamics and EML-3 depth analysis

two_d_regularity.description: 2D NS is proven regular: Enstrophy conservation prevents blow-up
two_d_regularity.reason: Enstrophy = EML-3 conserved quantity; its conservation is 2D depth ceiling

vortex_stretching_absent.description: Vortex stretching = 0 in 2D; the EML-inf mechanism is absent
vortex_stretching_absent.reason: 2D regularity proof: absence of stretching = absence of EML-inf mechanism

why_three.description: Three dimensions is threshold because vorticity is a pseudo-vector requiring 3D
why_three.reason: In 3D, vorticity is full vector; stretching term omega*grad(u) can grow unbounded

analysis.theorem: T545: Flatland Fluid Dynamics and EML-3 (S824).

key_theorem: T545: Flatland Fluid Dynamics and EML-3 (S824).
